filesChanged.description: Added Team import + Team-aware section: resolveEngineNameForTeam(team, config) + selectPipelineEngineForTeam(team, config), reusing the SAME exhaustive switch + byte-identical downgrade log line. selectPipelineEngine/resolveEngineName unchanged.

runPipeline now imports selectPipelineEngineForTeam + loadTeam; opts gains optional teamId?; resolves teamId = opts?.teamId ?? config.defaultTeam, loadTeam(config, teamId), selectPipelineEngineForTeam(team, config). No-team path -> programming, identical to before.

+8 tests (6->14): sc-3-4 programming equivalence, sc-3-5 workflow routing + ineligible/careful downgrade (logger.info call counts), sc-3-6 runPipeline team wiring (no-team -> programming, defaultTeam, opts.teamId override). vi.mock eligibility.

notes: Downgrade log line in resolveEngineNameForTeam (selector.ts:86) byte-identical to original (selector.ts:31). programming path preserved: loadTeam(config,undefined).pipelineShape === resolveEngineName(config) by construction (registry.ts:68). runPipeline's only non-test caller (cli/commands/run.ts:148) passes {runId} — backward compatible with additive optional teamId.
